description: Configure bcWebCam to append a TAB keystroke as the terminating character after each scanned barcode. Currently, the ENTER key is appended (the '<ENTER>' option is selected). Change this to TAB, which is useful when scanning barcodes into a spreadsheet where TAB moves the cursor to the next column. Open bcWebCam's Options dialog (gear icon in the bottom toolbar), find the 'Append terminating character to barcode data' section, select the '<TAB>' radio button, and click OK to apply.
